raw.message:
🎰 Introducing... Brett Flair and The New Slots. We're dropping the latest games every week at Betfair Casino. 👀
18+ T&Cs Apply. Please Gamble Responsibly.

hook.summary: High-energy synchronized dance and backflip intro in a monochromatic yellow setting.
hook.visual_action: A man performs a backflip over a group of men dressed in yellow outfits against a bright yellow background.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Introducing the new slots. Fresh new releases dropping every week

scene_flow: Dynamic intro with a backflip and bold text introducing 'The New Slots'.
Group of men in coordinated yellow outfits perform a stylized dance routine.
Lead performer sings into a microphone while others pose in the background.
Transition to a mobile phone displaying the Betfair Casino app interface with featured games.
Final shot showing specific slot game titles and the brand logo with a call to action.
audience_proxy: Adults 18+ interested in online gambling and looking for frequent new slot game content.
